highlight: Technical leadership in Frontend modernization through agnostic design systems, robust security with centralized access control, and workflow optimization with AI (Platform Engineering).
achievements: Implementation and centralization of the ability-based authorization system using CASL in the backend, eliminating permission code duplication and securing the platform's multi-tenant infrastructure.
Architecture and migration of the frontend towards an agnostic Design Tokens and component tokens structure, drastically accelerating interface development and visual consistency.

Establishment of an AI-Driven Development workflow, designing conceptual modules (Gems) for architecture governance and leveraging agents (Claude) for automated design extraction, component generation, and cloud documentation (AWS/S3).
